title: cylindropuntia × campii
intro: Cylindropuntia × campii, also known as the Camp's cholla, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Cylindropuntia, which is part of the prickly pear cactus family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia × campii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant's medicinal properties can be extracted and prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments to utilize its benefits.
